title: Snack Addition Stories
description: A tap-and-count snack story game where kids collect the total for informal addition within 6.
learningGoals: Count totals to answer number stories
interactionModel: tap shared food cards to collect the story total in a basket
feedbackModel: Each tap speaks the count; completed totals get sparkle SFX and warm spoken celebration from the tap-count engine.
credits: Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
